task_completion.description: The agent navigated to the Enrollment methods page for the General Chemistry (CHEM101) course.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A page titled 'Enrollment methods' is visible, with breadcrumbs or headers indicating the course is 'General Chemistry' or 'CHEM101'.

task_completion.description: The custom instance name for the self-enrollment method is set to 'Lab Safety Self-Enrollment'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the self-enrollment configuration form, the 'Custom instance name' field contains the text 'Lab Safety Self-Enrollment'.

task_completion.description: The enrollment key is configured as 'ChemFall2025'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the self-enrollment configuration form, the 'Enrollment key' field contains 'ChemFall2025' (either visible while typing or unmasked by clicking the eye icon).

task_completion.description: The enrollment duration is enabled and set to 180 days.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the self-enrollment configuration form, the 'Enrollment duration' checkbox is checked (enabled), the text input contains '180', and the dropdown is set to 'days'.

task_completion.description: The maximum enrolled users limit is set to 30.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the self-enrollment configuration form, the 'Max enrolled users' field contains the number '30'.
In the configuration form, 'Allow new enrollments' is set to 'Yes', OR on the Enrollment methods list page, the eye icon next to 'Lab Safety Self-Enrollment' is open (not crossed out).

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the Moodle web interface to configure the settings.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser navigating the Moodle application, rather than terminal commands or scripts.

integrity.description: The agent filled out the Moodle forms manually.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Moodle configuration forms being filled out, rather than a text editor containing the expected answers.

integrity.description: The agent did not use direct database queries to update the enrollment settings.
integrity.visual_evidence: There are no screenshots of a database client (like phpMyAdmin or MySQL CLI) executing UPDATE or INSERT statements.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target course is General Chemistry (CHEM101). The self-enrollment method must be configured with: Custom instance name = 'Lab Safety Self-Enrollment', Enrollment key = 'ChemFall2025', Enrollment duration = 180 days, Max enrolled users = 30. The method must be active (enabled).
